{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Forged blue beak
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Forged blue beak]] is a part of the dismantled blue crab Remnant.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
